description_long: This modern outdoor lounge set consists of a two-seater sofa, two single armchairs, and a rectangular coffee table, all featuring a sleek, minimalist design. The seating pieces have sturdy, metallic frames with straight lines and right angles, supporting thick, plush gray cushions for both the seat and backrest. The cushions are loose and generously sized, providing comfort and a contemporary look. The coffee table has a matching metallic frame and a slatted tabletop, suitable for outdoor use and easy drainage. The overall color palette is neutral, dominated by shades of gray and metallic silver, giving the set a sophisticated urban appeal. The design is functional and inviting, ideal for parks, patios, or communal urban spaces.
description: A modern outdoor lounge set with metallic frames, plush gray cushions, and a matching slatted coffee table. The set includes a two-seater sofa, two armchairs, and a table, all in a sleek, minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set: two armchairs flanking a two-seater sofa, with the coffee table centered in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sofa and armchairs, and the slatted design of the coffee table's top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back structure of the sofa and armchairs, as well as the table's frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the arrangement and thickness of the cushions and the table's profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each seat has a single thick seat cushion and a single back cushion; the sofa has two back cushions and two seat cushions, all loose and rectangular.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrests with a flat, rectangular profile and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; straight, metallic, open-frame armrests at seat height, matching the frame style.
attribute_leg_style: Straight, square-section metallic legs integrated into the frame, medium height, with a minimalistic, modern look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or tufting.
